name: HWR_SRVY_SUMMARY_VL
query: SELECT B.SURVEY_ID SURVEY_ID, B.QUESTIONNAIRE_ID QUESTIONNAIRE_ID, B.QUESTIONNAIRE_VERSION QUESTIONNAIRE_VERSION, B.QUESTIONS QUESTIONS, B.OWNER_ID OWNER_ID, B.SUBSCRIBER_ID SUBSCRIBER_ID, B.SUBSCRIBER_CODE SUBSCRIBER_CODE, B.PARTICPANT_COUNT PARTICPANT_COUNT, B.PARTICPANT_COMPLETION_COUNT PARTICPANT_COMPLETION_COUNT, B.START_DATE START_DATE, B.EXPIIRATION_DATE EXPIIRATION_DATE, B.ADVANCE_FLAG ADVANCE_FLAG, B.ANALYZED ANALYZED, B.MEETING_ID MEETING_ID, B.IS_DELETED IS_DELETED, B.SURVEY_BASE_ATTR_1 SURVEY_BASE_ATTR_1, B.SURVEY_BASE_ATTR_2 SURVEY_BASE_ATTR_2, B.SURVEY_BASE_ATTR_3 SURVEY_BASE_ATTR_3, B.SURVEY_BASE_ATTR_4 SURVEY_BASE_ATTR_4, B.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DATE, B.CREATED_BY CREATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, T.SURVEY_NAME SURVEY_NAME FROM HWR_SRVY_SUMMARY B, HWR_SRVY_SUMMARY_TL T WHERE B.SURVEY_ID = T.SURVEY_ID AND B.QUESTIONNAIRE_ID = T.QUESTIONNAIRE_ID AND B.QUESTIONNAIRE_VERSION = T.QUESTIONNAIRE_VERSION AND T.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
